name: McpVanguard
description: Security gateway for the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Protects MCP servers and tools before risky agent traffic reaches them.

VANGUARD_API_KEY.description: Required secret for SSE clients. Requests must send this in the X-Api-Key header.

MCP_SERVER_COMMAND.description: Shell command used to spawn the target MCP server (for example 'npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem /path/to/data').

VANGUARD_VEX_URL.description: Optional VEX endpoint for downstream audit and evidence workflows.

VANGUARD_VEX_KEY.description: Optional key used for VEX integration.

VANGUARD_OLLAMA_URL.description: Optional Ollama base URL for Layer 2 semantic scoring.

VANGUARD_REDIS_URL.description: Optional Redis connection string for Layer 3 behavioral state.

VANGUARD_DISABLE_UVLOOP.description: Set to 1 if you encounter uvloop subprocess issues in your deployment environment.

VANGUARD_METADATA_INSPECTION_ENABLED.description: Enable metadata inspection on server-to-agent responses.

VANGUARD_SERVER_MANIFEST_FILE.description: Optional path to the upstream server manifest used for integrity verification.
